description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: test-nixos and build. The test-nixos job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.10 and 3.9 respectively, installing Nix and running tests in a nix-shell. The build job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest with Python 3.7 to 3.10, setting up Python, upgrading pip, building and validating distributions, installing dependencies, running pytest with optional mypy and pylint, and checking code style and security.
